plan.summary: Moderate-volume aerobic build week with one threshold quality session mid-week; ATL is elevated above CTL but HRV is strong and readiness is high, so volume is maintained with intensity carefully limited to a single quality effort.

workout.label: Full Rest Day
workout.description: Complete rest. ATL is meaningfully above CTL (43.9 vs 35.9, TSB -8.0) after a big TSS week (349). HRV and readiness are excellent, so no concern about illness or overtraining, but passive recovery today sets up a strong week. Light walking or stretching only if desired.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats cooked, 1 banana sliced, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp chia seeds, splash oat milk
nutrition.lunch: Lentil grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 100g cooked green lentils, roasted zucchini and bell pepper, 1 tbsp tahini-lemon dressing
nutrition.dinner: Black bean and sweet potato tacos: 2 corn tortillas, canned black beans, roasted sweet potato cubes, shredded cabbage, salsa, avocado slices

workout.label: Easy Aerobic Swim
workout.description: Z2 easy aerobic swim. 200m warm-up easy freestyle, 4x200m steady Z2 (20s rest between), 100m cool-down easy. Total ~1100m. Keep effort conversational, focus on long stroke and breathing rhythm. No pushing pace.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp chia seeds, splash oat milk
nutrition.lunch: Lentil grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 100g cooked green lentils, roasted broccoli and carrot, 1 tbsp tahini-lemon dressing
nutrition.dinner: Tofu stir-fry: 180g firm tofu pan-fried, mixed stir-fry vegetables (cabbage, bell pepper, snap peas), brown rice 150g cooked, soy-ginger sauce
nutrition.snacks: Rice cake with peanut butter, small handful sunflower seeds

workout.label: Easy Z2 Run
workout.description: Z2 easy aerobic run. Keep HR strictly below 145 bpm the entire time. Flat or gently rolling terrain. Run by feel — if HR drifts above 145 in any heat or humidity, walk briefly to bring it back down. Conversational pace throughout. This is pure aerobic base work.

nutrition.breakfast: 2-egg scramble with sautéed spinach and cherry tomatoes, 2 slices whole grain toast, 1 tbsp olive oil
nutrition.lunch: Lentil grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 100g canned chickpeas, roasted sweet potato, cucumber, 1 tbsp tahini dressing
nutrition.dinner: Baked cod fillet (150g), roasted broccoli and sweet potato wedges, side of cooked quinoa 100g

workout.label: Threshold Ride — QUALITY SESSION
workout.description: This is the single quality session of the week. 15 min Z2 warm-up, then 3x10 min at Z3-Z4 threshold (RPE 7/10, HR 155–168 bpm), with 5 min easy Z2 spin between each interval, then 15 min Z2 cool-down. Total ~75 min. HRV at 83ms and readiness 89 support this effort. If legs feel dead mid-session, reduce to 2x10 min and extend cool-down — do not force it.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tbsp chia seeds, oat milk — eat 60–90 min pre-ride
nutrition.lunch: Lentil grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 100g green lentils, roasted bell pepper and zucchini, tahini dressing, 1 hard-boiled egg
nutrition.dinner: Tempeh and vegetable curry: 180g tempeh, chickpeas, spinach, diced tomato, coconut milk, curry spices, served over 150g cooked brown rice
nutrition.snacks: Banana + rice cake pre-ride if needed, Greek yogurt 150g + berries post-ride recovery

workout.label: Strength & Mobility
workout.description: Full-body triathlete strength circuit. 3 rounds: goblet squat x12, single-leg Romanian deadlift x10 each side, push-up x15, seated cable row or band row x12, side-lying clamshells x15 each, dead bug x10 each side. Finish with 10 min mobility: hip flexor stretch, thoracic rotation, calf/Achilles stretch, pigeon pose. Keep intensity low — this is maintenance and injury prevention, not fatigue-building.

nutrition.breakfast: 2-egg scramble with sautéed spinach and cherry tomatoes, 2 slices whole grain toast, olive oil
nutrition.lunch: Lentil grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, canned black beans, roasted broccoli, shredded carrot, salsa and tahini
nutrition.dinner: Pasta e fagioli: whole grain pasta 100g dry, canned cannellini beans, diced tomato, garlic, vegetable broth, olive oil, fresh parsley
nutrition.snacks: Apple + 20g almonds, rice cake with peanut butter

workout.label: Easy Z2 Run
workout.description: Z2 easy recovery-pace run the day after strength. HR strictly below 145 bpm. This run should feel effortless — the goal is aerobic stimulus, not speed. If legs are sore from Thursday strength work, shorten to 35 min or replace with 30 min easy walk and body weight mobility. Do not push.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, chia seeds, oat milk
nutrition.lunch: Lentil grain bowl: 150g cooked quinoa, 100g green lentils, roasted sweet potato, cucumber, tahini-lemon dressing
nutrition.dinner: Tuna and white bean bowl: 1 can tuna in olive oil, canned cannellini beans, cherry tomatoes, arugula, red onion, lemon-olive oil dressing, whole grain pita
nutrition.snacks: Banana + small handful almonds, Greek yogurt 150g

workout.label: Long Easy Z2 Ride
workout.description: Z2 aerobic long ride to close the week. Keep HR 130–145 bpm throughout. Flat to rolling terrain preferred. Steady comfortable effort — no surges, no chasing. Bring a water bottle and a snack for the back half (banana or rice cake). This is the primary volume driver of the week and should feel sustainable. Focus on smooth cadence 85–95 rpm.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, chia seeds, oat milk — eat 90 min before ride
nutrition.lunch: Post-ride recovery bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 2 fried eggs, roasted broccoli and bell pepper, avocado slices, soy drizzle
nutrition.dinner: Baked salmon fillet (150g), roasted sweet potato and asparagus, side of cooked quinoa 100g, lemon-dill dressing
nutrition.snacks: Banana or rice cake mid-ride, apple + 20g almonds afternoon

weekly_totals.note: TSS comes in around 313 — intentionally slightly below last week's 349 to allow ATL to begin descending back toward CTL without losing fitness. HRV and readiness support the single quality session Wednesday. Week-over-week CTL should nudge up ~1–1.5 points. Next week can add swim volume (+100–200m) and extend one run to 55 min to resume progressive overload.

Protein: canned tuna in olive oil x1

conversation.content:
Plan the week of Jun 22 – Jun 28.

Current fitness data:
- CTL (fitness): 35.9
- ATL (fatigue): 43.9
- TSB (form): -8.0 (positive = fresh, negative = fatigued)
- TSS last 7 days: 349
- TSS prior 7 days: 131
- Last night HRV: 83 ms
- 7-day avg HRV: 77.7 ms
- 7-day avg resting HR: 50.6 bpm
- Oura readiness score: 89/100

Use this data to calibrate intensity and volume for the week.
